examples: The MBR partitioning system is a hodge-podge of data structure patches applied to overcome earlier limits.
He advocated eliminating a hodge-podge of tax reductions, but were silent on a multitude of others.
The world is a unique world, not just a hodge-podge of things from popular fantasy.
It is an ethnic hodge-podge of Uzbeks and Tajiks, Aimaq and Hazaras, Turkmen, Mongols and Baluch.
